tasks.subject: Task 1: Shared validateReturnTo + converge consent/federation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One server-side validator accepting a same-origin relative path OR absolute URL, normalising to a safe relative path; consent + federation use it.

**Files:** Create pkg/server/returnto.go + returnto_test.go; Modify pkg/server/handle_consent.go (replace sameOriginAsIssuer ~:80, delete helper :150), pkg/server/handle_federation.go (:61,:202).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/returnto.go","pkg/server/returnto_test.go","pkg/server/handle_consent.go","pkg/server/handle_federation.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run \"ReturnTo|Consent|Federation\" -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["validateReturnTo returns same-origin relative path or /","test matrix mirrors returnTo.test.ts","consent+federation converge and tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: login/complete returns server-validated redirect (LoginResult)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** WebAuthn login/complete + password completion read return_to, validate via validateReturnTo, return LoginResult{Redirect}.

**Files:** Modify pkg/contract/auth.go (add LoginResult), pkg/server/handle_auth.go (~:314), pkg/server/handle_auth_password.go (~:303).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/handle_auth.go","pkg/server/handle_auth_password.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run \"Login|Password|Totp\" -count=1","acceptanceCriteria":["LoginResult contract type added","webauthn + password completion return server-validated redirect","return_to read from request query","login tests updated green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SPA follows the server redirect (mirror ConsentView)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Login ceremony sends return_to and navigates to the server's redirect; success path stops using client safeReturnTo.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/components/custom/PasskeyButton.vue, PasswordTotpForm.vue, dashboard/src/pages/LoginView.vue; tests.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/PasskeyButton.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/PasswordTotpForm.vue","dashboard/src/pages/LoginView.vue"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm test && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["ceremony sends return_to + emits server redirect","LoginView hardRedirects the server-blessed value","already-authenticated branch unchanged","FE tests + typecheck green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Verify end-to-end + rebuild dist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full gate green and the two-instance federation flow works through a real passkey login.

**Files:** Modify pkg/webui/dist (rebuilt + committed).

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["full Go + FE gate green","dist rebuilt+committed","federation lab resumes to /oauth/authorize after login"]}
```
